criteria_verification.criterion_text: Output directory structure created on startup
criteria_verification.evidence: prepare_output_directory() creates output/ and output/rag_index/ via mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True). Tests verify creation from scratch (test_creates_output_dir_when_missing, test_creates_rag_index_subdir), nested parents (test_creates_nested_parent_directories), and idempotent calls (test_idempotent_creation). Both fresh and resume modes create the structure.
criteria_verification.notes: prepare_output_directory() creates output/ and output/rag_index/ via mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True). Tests verify creation from scratch (test_creates_output_dir_when_missing, test_creates_rag_index_subdir), nested parents (test_creates_nested_parent_directories), and idempotent calls (test_idempotent_creation). Both fresh and resume modes create the structure.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Fresh start removes previous output files (BDD: "Fresh start cleans the output directory")
criteria_verification.evidence: Enhanced prepare_output_directory(resume=False) to use _clean_output_directory() which iterates over output dir children and removes all files/subdirectories except .lock. Previously used shutil.rmtree which removed .lock too. Tests verify: train.jsonl removed (test_fresh_start_removes_train_jsonl), rejected.jsonl removed (test_fresh_start_removes_rejected_jsonl), rag_index contents removed (test_fresh_start_removes_rag_index_contents), checkpoint removed (test_fresh_start_removes_checkpoint), .lock preserved (test_fresh_start_preserves_lock_file), all non-lock files removed (test_fresh_start_removes_all_non_lock_files).

criteria_verification.evidence: prepare_output_directory(resume=True) skips cleaning entirely, only ensures directory structure exists. Tests verify preservation of: train.jsonl (test_resume_preserves_train_jsonl), rejected.jsonl (test_resume_preserves_rejected_jsonl), knowledge.jsonl (test_resume_preserves_knowledge_jsonl), checkpoint (test_resume_preserves_checkpoint), all files including lock (test_resume_preserves_all_existing_files). Also creates rag_index if missing (test_resume_creates_rag_index_if_missing).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Files opened in append mode for generation loop compatibility
criteria_verification.evidence: Created OutputFileManager context manager in entrypoint/output.py that opens train.jsonl, rejected.jsonl, and rag_index/knowledge.jsonl in append mode ('a') with UTF-8 encoding. Tests verify: all three files opened (test_opens_all_three_files), append mode confirmed via .mode attribute (test_files_opened_in_append_mode), existing content preserved on append (test_append_preserves_existing_content), data written to all three files (test_write_to_all_three_files), handles closed on context exit (test_context_manager_closes_handles), multiple append sessions work (test_multiple_appends_across_sessions). Integration tests verify prepare_output_directory + OutputFileManager work together for both fresh and resume modes.
criteria_verification.notes: Created OutputFileManager context manager in entrypoint/output.py that opens train.jsonl, rejected.jsonl, and rag_index/knowledge.jsonl in append mode ('a') with UTF-8 encoding.
